export function scan(requests,head){let diskSize=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:200;let direction=arguments.length>3&&arguments[3]!==undefined?arguments[3]:1;let sequence=[head];let totalMovement=0;// Step 1: Sort requests
let sorted=[...requests].sort((a,b)=>a-b);// Step 2: Find first request greater than head
let index=0;while(index<sorted.length&&sorted[index]<head){index++;}if(direction===1){// Move right
for(let i=index;i<sorted.length;i++){totalMovement+=Math.abs(sorted[i]-head);head=sorted[i];sequence.push(head);}if(head!==diskSize-1){totalMovement+=Math.abs(diskSize-1-head);head=diskSize-1;sequence.push(head);}for(let i=index-1;i>=0;i--){totalMovement+=Math.abs(sorted[i]-head);head=sorted[i];sequence.push(head);}}else{// Move left
for(let i=index-1;i>=0;i--){totalMovement+=Math.abs(sorted[i]-head);head=sorted[i];sequence.push(head);}if(head!==0){totalMovement+=head;head=0;sequence.push(head);}for(let i=index;i<sorted.length;i++){totalMovement+=Math.abs(sorted[i]-head);head=sorted[i];sequence.push(head);}}return{totalMovement,sequence};}
